name: Zaytoven
description:
'''Xavier Lamar Dotson''' (born January 12, 1980), known professionally as '''Zaytoven''', is an American record producer from [[Atlanta]], Georgia. He has released collaborative projects with artists including [[Gucci Mane]], [[Usher (musician)|Usher]], [[Future (rapper)|Future]], [[Young Dolph]], [[Migos]], [[Lecrae]], [[Lil Yachty]], [[Chief Keef]], [[Young Scooter]], [[B.o.B]], [[Boosie Badazz]], [[Waka Flocka Flame]], [[21 Savage]], [[Deitrick Haddon]] and La Fève.

After producing Gucci Mane's 2005 single "[[Icy (Gucci Mane song)|Icy]]", Zaytoven signed with [[1017 Records]] as in-house talent. He was credited on Usher's 2009 single "[[Papers (song)|Papers]]", which peaked within the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]]'s top 40.
